info.english_meaning: to go to rule to punish
info.kOmudIDAtukramANkaH: ayaM DAtuH sidDAntakOmudyAm pfTag rUpeRa nEva pAWyate  parantu tatra 2.14 kaMs ityatra 'tAlavyAnto'pyanidit' iti nirdeSena ayaM pAWaBedaH jYApitaH asti

upasargachandrika.example_text: prakaSa ityATarvaRe (9.1.21) paWyate dyOH kaSA vidyutprakaSaH tatra kaSaprahAra ityarTaH
